title: Erfurt, Thuringia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Erfurt, Thuringia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Erfurt is a city in Thuringia with a population of 214,000. Thuringia’s capital, a medieval treasure with a stunning cathedral, the Krämerbrücke, Martin Luther’s legacy, and a vibrant cultural scene.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
